confirmDeleteWorld: Delete "{{name}}"? This cascades to all {{pages}} pages and removes any room links. Cannot be undone.

combat.label: Combat
combat.desc: How central physical conflict and action scenes are to play.

magic.label: Magic
magic.desc: How present supernatural / magical elements are in the setting.

technology.label: Technology
technology.desc: Tech baseline from primitive (low) to far-future (high).

romance.label: Romance
romance.desc: Expected weight of romantic plotlines between characters.

mystery.label: Mystery
mystery.desc: Investigation, puzzles, hidden truths, slow reveals.

horror.label: Horror
horror.desc: Dread, body horror, psychological terror, dark themes.

exploration.label: Exploration
exploration.desc: Discovery, travel, wilderness, mapping the unknown.

visibilityOption.open: Open (catalog-listed, others can link to their rooms)

linkPicker.buttonTitle: Insert a link to a Location / NPC / Item / Faction / Lore page

arcs.heading: Arcs
arcs.confirmDelete: Delete arc "{{title}}"? Entries/pages/sessions keep existing but lose this arc.

entities.confirmDeleteKind: Delete the "{{label}}" kind? (only works when it has no entries)
entities.noEntries: No entries of this kind yet.

application.title: Apply to join
application.privateWorld: This world is private, you'd need to sign in or be invited.
application.alreadyPending: You already have a pending application for this world. The owner hasn't reviewed it yet.
application.noQuestionsIntent: No questions, just intent to join.
application.noQuestionsSubmit: The owner hasn't set any questions, submit to register your interest in joining.

myWorlds.title: Your worlds
myWorlds.browseCatalogTitle: Browse open worlds you can use in your rooms
myWorlds.noWorlds: No worlds yet. Click "+ New world" to start one.
myWorlds.confirmLeave: Leave "{{name}}"? You can re-join from the world catalog any time.

newWorld.heading: New world
newWorld.slugHint: Used in URLs and the /world link slash command. Auto-derived from the name if blank.

viewer.confirmLeave: Leave this world? You can re-join from the catalog any time.
viewer.inviteOnlyTitle: The author of this world adds members directly. Message them if you'd like in.
viewer.applicationPendingTitle: Your application is waiting on the author.
viewer.reapplyTitle: Your last application was declined. You can apply again.
viewer.applyTitle: Send the author an application to join this world.
viewer.joinTitle: Join this world as your current identity. Doesn't change room access.

catalog.title: World catalog
catalog.noMatches: No worlds match the current filters.
catalog.noOpenWorlds: No open worlds yet. Be the first, mark one of yours as “open” in its settings.
catalog.joinedTitle: You're a member of this world. Manage from My Worlds.
catalog.inviteOnlyTitle: The owner adds members directly, no public Join.
catalog.applyTitle: Submit an application to join, the owner reviews it.
catalog.joinTitle: Join this world to declare an affiliation. Doesn't affect room access.
catalog.useInRoomTitle: Attach this world to the room you're currently in (owner/mod only)

overview.noDescription: This world has no description yet.

joinCard.member: You're a member of this world.
joinCard.signIn: Sign in to join this world.
joinCard.inviteOnly: This world is invite-only. The author adds members directly. Message them if you'd like in.
joinCard.pending: Your application is pending the author's review.
joinCard.acceptsApplications: This world accepts applications to join.
joinCard.open: This world is open. Join as your current identity.

editor.title: Edit world
editor.navEntriesTitle: Locations, NPCs, Items, Factions, custom kinds
editor.confirmDeletePageChildren_one: Delete "{{title}}" and its {{count}} child page? Cannot be undone.
editor.confirmDeletePageChildren_other: Delete "{{title}}" and its {{count}} child pages? Cannot be undone.
editor.metaIntro_one: {{count}} page. Visibility controls who can read this world: private = only you, public = anyone with the URL, open = also listed in the catalog and linkable from other people's rooms.
editor.metaIntro_other: {{count}} pages. Visibility controls who can read this world: private = only you, public = anyone with the URL, open = also listed in the catalog and linkable from other people's rooms.
editor.slugHint: Used in URLs and the /world link slash command. Lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens; 1-60 chars.
editor.nsfwHint: 18+ worlds are hidden from members under 18.
editor.catalogIntro: Surfaces in the World Catalog filter UI. Genre and tags help readers find your world; content warnings let them filter what they'd rather not encounter.
editor.statusHint: Featured status is admin-curated only; owners can move between Active and Archived.
editor.vibeIntro: Tune what the play in this world feels like. Each axis is 0–100 and shows as a bar on your catalog card. Leave an axis unset (clear it) if your setting has nothing to say about it — the card hides the bar instead of showing a tiny "0%".
editor.joinModeOpen: Open — one-click Join from the catalog
editor.joinModeApplication: Application — people apply, you approve / reject
editor.joinModeInviteOnly: Invite-only — only you can add members
editor.joinModeHint: Independent of visibility — a private world can still take applications from people you share the link with.
editor.inviteOnlyBody: the catalog Join button is disabled for everyone. The only way someone becomes a member is if you add them directly using the search field below. Switch to <1>Application</1> if you want would-be members to apply for review instead.
editor.themeIntro: A custom palette for this world's editor and viewer modals only. Doesn't affect chat or the userlist - just the wiki views your readers see.
editor.removeTheme: Remove custom theme (use viewer's chat theme)

invite.heading: Invite a member
invite.searchPlaceholder: Search by username or character name…
invite.searchAria: Search for a user or character to invite
invite.typeMore: Type at least two letters. Each identity (the OOC handle plus every character on that account) shows up as its own row so you can pick exactly which face joins.

questions.empty: No questions — applicants will submit just their intent to join. Add a question or two to gather context (RP experience, character concept, schedule, etc.).
questions.placeholder: e.g. Tell us about your character concept.

apps.noQuestions: No questions — applicant submitted just their intent to join.
apps.notePlaceholder: Optional note for the applicant (shown on approve / reject)…

collab.heading: Collaborators
collab.ownerDescription: Invite other users to co-edit this world's pages. They can add, edit, and delete pages, but only you can manage this list, change visibility critical bits, or delete the world.
collab.viewerDescription: Users with edit access to this world. Only the owner can add or remove collaborators.

page.bodyPlaceholder: Write the page body here. Same HTML allow-list as your bio (b, i, em, p, ul/ol/li, blockquote, h3-h6, etc.).
page.sanitizedHint: HTML is sanitized server-side. Disallowed tags and attributes are stripped on save.
page.sortOrderHint: Lower = higher in the sidebar. Ties broken by creation time.
page.bodyOptionalPlaceholder: You can fill this in later.
